document_text: SpaceX successfully launched 98 Falcon 9 rockets in 2023, achieving a 98% success rate. The company also launched the Starship fully integrated flight test. Elon Musk founded SpaceX in 2002.
question: How many Falcon 9 rockets did SpaceX launch in 2023?
ai_answer: SpaceX launched 98 Falcon 9 rockets in 2023 with a 98% success rate. Elon Musk founded the company in 2002. The company also conducted Starship testing.
